text: A man wearing a mask holding a sander.
Motorcycles sitting beside each other in a garage.
A child swinging a bat in batters box.
A large truck hauling a passenger rail car.
A street sign is in front of a house and next to a vehicle.
Lots of people on skis preparing to race downhill.
A room with two beds, television, fireplace and walkout doors.
A girl with a dog walking by a shop where people are seated outside.
A row of custom scooters parked on the gravel.
An old black and white photo of a baseball game in progress.
